---
title: "Analisis exploratorio"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r carga de datos}
load("datos/listings.RData")
ls()
```

```{r carga de paquetes}
library(nortest)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(cluster)
library(mclust)
library(NbClust)
library(factoextra)
library(hopkins)
library(GGally)
```

```{r primera vista a los datos}
colnames(listings)
dim(listings)
head(listings)
tipos_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(listings),
  Tipo = sapply(listings, class),
  row.names = NULL
)
View(tipos_df)
```
```{r resumen completo}
summary(listings)
```


```{r variables numéricas}
numericas <- c("accommodates","bathrooms","bedrooms","beds","host_response_rate","host_acceptance_rate","calculated_host_listings_count","number_of_reviews","reviews_per_month","review_scores_rating","minimum_nights","availability_365"
)

sapply(listings[numericas], class)
```
```{r convertir de character a numérico}
listings$host_response_rate <- gsub("%", "", listings$host_response_rate)
listings$host_response_rate[listings$host_response_rate == "N/A"] <- NA
listings$host_response_rate <- as.numeric(listings$host_response_rate)

listings$host_acceptance_rate <- gsub("%", "", listings$host_acceptance_rate)
listings$host_acceptance_rate[listings$host_acceptance_rate == "N/A"] <- NA
listings$host_acceptance_rate <- as.numeric(listings$host_acceptance_rate)
```

```{r verificar los NA}
colSums(is.na(listings[numericas]))
colSums(is.na(listings[numericas])) / nrow(listings)
```

```{r extraer parte numérica de los baños}
head(listings$bathrooms_text)
listings$bathrooms_num <- as.numeric(sub("[^0-9.].*", "",listings$bathrooms_text))
listings$bathrooms_num[grepl("Half", listings$bathrooms_text, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- 0.5

sum(is.na(listings$bathrooms_num))
listings$bathrooms_num[is.na(listings$bathrooms_num)] <- 
median(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r tomar la parte categórica de baños}
listings$bathroom_type <- ifelse(
  grepl("shared", listings$bathrooms_text, ignore.case = TRUE),
  "shared",
  "private"
)

listings$bathroom_type <- as.factor(listings$bathroom_type)
summary(listings$bathrooms_num)
table(listings$bathroom_type)
```

```{r eliminar otras variables de baños para no confundirlas}
listings$bathrooms_text <- NULL
listings$bathrooms <- NULL
```

```{r manejo de NA de otras variables}
listings$bedrooms[is.na(listings$bedrooms)] <- median(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$beds[is.na(listings$beds)] <- 
median(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$host_response_missing <- ifelse(is.na(listings$host_response_rate), 1, 0)
listings$host_response_rate[is.na(listings$host_response_rate)] <- 
mean(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$host_acceptance_missing <- ifelse(is.na(listings$host_acceptance_rate), 1, 0)
listings$host_acceptance_rate[is.na(listings$host_acceptance_rate)] <- 
mean(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

listings$reviews_per_month[is.na(listings$reviews_per_month)] <- 0

listings$has_reviews <- ifelse(is.na(listings$review_scores_rating), 0, 1)
listings$review_scores_rating[is.na(listings$review_scores_rating)] <- 
mean(listings$review_scores_rating, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r verificar que ya no haya NA}

numericas_final <- c(
"accommodates",
"bathrooms_num",
"bedrooms",
"beds",
"host_response_rate",
"host_acceptance_rate",
"calculated_host_listings_count",
"number_of_reviews",
"reviews_per_month",
"review_scores_rating",
"minimum_nights",
"availability_365"
)

colSums(is.na(listings[, numericas_final]))
```
### Medidas de tendencia central

```{r medidas de tendencia central accommodates}
mean(listings$accommodates, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$accommodates, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$accommodates, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$accommodates, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$accommodates, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$accommodates,
     main = "Histograma de Accommodates",
     xlab = "Accommodates",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$accommodates,
        main = "Boxplot de Accommodates",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$accommodates,
                   min(5000, length(listings$accommodates))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central para bathrooms_num}
mean(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$bathrooms_num, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$bathrooms_num,
     main = "Histograma de Bathrooms",
     xlab = "Bathrooms",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$bathrooms_num,
        main = "Boxplot de Bathrooms",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$bathrooms_num,
                   min(5000, length(listings$bathrooms_num))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central para bedrooms}
mean(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$bedrooms, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$bedrooms,
     main = "Histograma de Bedrooms",
     xlab = "Bedrooms",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$bedrooms,
        main = "Boxplot de Bedrooms",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$bedrooms,
                   min(5000, length(listings$bedrooms))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central para beds}
mean(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$beds, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$beds,
     main = "Histograma de Beds",
     xlab = "Beds",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$beds,
        main = "Boxplot de Beds",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$beds,
                   min(5000, length(listings$beds))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central para host_response_rate}
mean(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$host_response_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$host_response_rate,
     main = "Histograma de Host Response Rate",
     xlab = "Host Response Rate",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$host_response_rate,
        main = "Boxplot de Host Response Rate",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$host_response_rate,
                   min(5000, length(listings$host_response_rate))))
```


```{r medidas de tendencia central para host_acceptance_rate}
mean(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$host_acceptance_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$host_acceptance_rate,
     main = "Histograma de Host Acceptance Rate",
     xlab = "Host Acceptance Rate",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$host_acceptance_rate,
        main = "Boxplot de Host Acceptance Rate",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$host_acceptance_rate,
                   min(5000, length(listings$host_acceptance_rate))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de calculated_host_listings_count}
mean(listings$calculated_host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE)
median(listings$calculated_host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE)
min(listings$calculated_host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE)
max(listings$calculated_host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(listings$calculated_host_listings_count, na.rm = TRUE)

hist(listings$calculated_host_listings_count,
     main = "Histograma de Calculated Host Listings Count",
     xlab = "Calculated Host Listings Count",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$calculated_host_listings_count,
        main = "Boxplot de Calculated Host Listings Count",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$calculated_host_listings_count,
                   min(5000, length(listings$calculated_host_listings_count))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de number_of_reviews}
mean(listings$number_of_reviews)
median(listings$number_of_reviews)
min(listings$number_of_reviews)
max(listings$number_of_reviews)
quantile(listings$number_of_reviews)

hist(listings$number_of_reviews,
     main = "Histograma de Number of Reviews",
     xlab = "Number of Reviews",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$number_of_reviews,
        main = "Boxplot de Number of Reviews",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$number_of_reviews,
                   min(5000, length(listings$number_of_reviews))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de reviews_per_month}
mean(listings$reviews_per_month)
median(listings$reviews_per_month)
min(listings$reviews_per_month)
max(listings$reviews_per_month)
quantile(listings$reviews_per_month)

hist(listings$reviews_per_month,
     main = "Histograma de Reviews per Month",
     xlab = "Reviews per Month",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$reviews_per_month,
        main = "Boxplot de Reviews per Month",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$reviews_per_month,
                   min(5000, length(listings$reviews_per_month))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de review_scores_rating}
mean(listings$review_scores_rating)
median(listings$review_scores_rating)
min(listings$review_scores_rating)
max(listings$review_scores_rating)
quantile(listings$review_scores_rating)

hist(listings$review_scores_rating,
     main = "Histograma de Review Scores Rating",
     xlab = "Review Scores Rating",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$review_scores_rating,
        main = "Boxplot de Review Scores Rating",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$review_scores_rating,
                   min(5000, length(listings$review_scores_rating))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de minimum_nights}
mean(listings$minimum_nights)
median(listings$minimum_nights)
min(listings$minimum_nights)
max(listings$minimum_nights)
quantile(listings$minimum_nights)

hist(listings$minimum_nights,
     main = "Histograma de Minimum Nights",
     xlab = "Minimum Nights",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$minimum_nights,
        main = "Boxplot de Minimum Nights",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$minimum_nights,
                   min(5000, length(listings$minimum_nights))))
```

```{r medidas de tendencia central de availabulity_365}
mean(listings$availability_365)
median(listings$availability_365)
min(listings$availability_365)
max(listings$availability_365)
quantile(listings$availability_365)

hist(listings$availability_365,
     main = "Histograma de Availability 365",
     xlab = "Availability 365",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white")

boxplot(listings$availability_365,
        main = "Boxplot de Availability 365",
        col = "lightgreen")

lillie.test(sample(listings$availability_365,
                   min(5000, length(listings$availability_365))))
```

```{r}
# A. Correlación de todas las variables numéricas
# Esto te dirá qué variables afectan más a tu 'target'
ggcorr(listings[, numericas_final], label = TRUE, label_size = 3, layout.exp = 1)

# B. Relación de una variable clave vs la Respuesta (ejemplo: precio o rating)
# Si tu variable respuesta es 'review_scores_rating':
ggplot(listings, aes(x = accommodates, y = review_scores_rating)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Relación entre Capacidad y Calificación",
       x = "Capacidad (Accommodates)", y = "Rating")

# C. Relación Categórica vs Respuesta
# ¿Influye el tipo de baño en la calificación?
ggplot(listings, aes(x = bathroom_type, y = review_scores_rating, fill = bathroom_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Rating según tipo de baño")
```
